entities.name: Structured knowledge base
entities.context: Framework for organizing V's knowledge into categorized entries

entities.name: Facts
entities.context: Category of verified, objective information within knowledge base

entities.name: Beliefs
entities.context: Category of subjective positions and values within knowledge base

entities.name: Hypotheses
entities.context: Category of testable assumptions within knowledge base

entities.name: SSOT (Single Source of Truth)
entities.context: Principle ensuring one authoritative source for each piece of knowledge

entities.name: Automatic cross-referencing
entities.context: Process that links related knowledge entries automatically

entities.name: Semantic search
entities.context: Search capability based on meaning rather than keywords

entities.name: Ingestion
entities.context: Process for importing content from articles, documents, emails

relationships.context: Enforcement principle applied to knowledge base
Capability for querying the knowledge base
Capability for linking entries within knowledge base
Feeds external content into knowledge base
